title: Copper Trim Recipes
description: Replaces diamonds by copper ingots in the armor trims recipes.
body:
This project is no longer updated because I failed (somehow) to do so. If you manage to make this mod / datapack work in newer versions, please contact me at [froelen@proton.me](mailto:froelen@proton.me). Up to 50% of monetization could be rewarded to you!

# Copper Trim Recipes
Have you ever thought that duplicating Armor Trims is too **expensive**? Or that copper doesn't have **enough utilities**?

Well now, both problems are **solved** because copper ingots replaced diamonds in their recipe!

![All 18 copper-colored armor trims](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/602ed94c04a9fd32c6e7c0208d6c49ea8c6de11b.png)

### Details:
All 18 Armor Trims now have a modified recipe which replace diamonds by copper ingots. Their texture has been modified as well to replace the diamond colored part by a copper colored part. Their behavior remains the same as in Vanilla Minecraft.
  
Note that the old recipe (using diamonds) won't work anymore.

Note that Netherite Upgrade remains unchanged and still needs diamonds in order to be duplicated, its texture has not been changed so.

SERVER SIDE ONLY DOES NOT MEAN IT CAN'T WORK IN SINGLEPLAYER !!!
You are playing on a 'local server' when on singleplayer, meaning the mod will work!
